creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 155181
Successful poudriere build log of abiword 3.0.1 with USE_GCC=yes

This problem is fixed with the update of editors/abiword to 3.0.1 submitted in PR199156. The poudriere build log is attached for evidence (note this GCC is no version gcc-4.8.4_1 by default in the ports tree).
